title: TpmRc type not re-exported at wolftpm crate root — users can't name the type
description: wolftpm/src/lib.rs does 'pub use error::Error' but not 'pub use error::TpmRc'. Users who pattern-match 'Error::Tpm { rc }' and want to call rc.raw() or rc.is_success() have a value of type wolftpm::error::TpmRc that they cannot name at the crate root. Add 'pub use error::TpmRc;' to lib.rs so callers can write 'use wolftpm::TpmRc' instead of 'use wolftpm::error::TpmRc'.
